expectations.text: Explains that the auth token must be stored in localStorage
expectations.evidence: Section 'Root Cause' explains: 'The useAuth() hook redirects if localStorage has no "auth" key' and section 'The Fix' details storing the auth token in localStorage.

expectations.text: Explains that localStorage must be set BEFORE cy.visit()
expectations.evidence: Section heading '1. Set localStorage BEFORE visiting the page' and usage of onBeforeLoad callback to set values before React hydrates.

expectations.text: Includes a code snippet showing the fix
expectations.evidence: Multiple TypeScript code blocks are included showing the fix, including a 'Complete Working Example' section with a full beforeEach block.
Multiple references: win.localStorage.setItem('auth', JSON.stringify('fake-jwt-token')) and table row mentioning '"auth" key missing from localStorage'.
